---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the CommandVue template
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem statement

What problem does this feature solve? Why is it important for a _template_ rather than a downstream fork?

## Proposed solution

A clear, concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about, and why they were rejected.

## Additional context

Mockups, links to similar implementations, screenshots, or design notes.
